comment: Routes the runtime hydration check visits. Add public/SSR routes whose hydration must stay clean. Auth-gated pages with definePageMeta({ ssr: false }) do NOT need to be listed (they have nothing to hydrate). When you add or significantly change a public page, add it here. The app-shell and not-found entries use anonymous viewers and deterministic 404 slugs so the check passes with or without a live API (it exercises SSR shell + error-path hydration, not data rendering).
